skeptical_plan_audit.proxy_metric_control: P2 records no value, gradient, ESS, or runtime performance metrics.  Threshold fields are frozen as diagnostic-only or adapter-blocked before execution.
skeptical_plan_audit.stop_conditions: P3/P4 must consume this frozen contract.  Rows with missing callback contracts are blocked rather than run.
skeptical_plan_audit.wrong_baseline_control: Old V2 LEDH-PFPF-OT contracts define coverage only.  P2 does not use old values, gradients, or OT route identifiers as Algorithm 1 evidence.

threshold_policy.gradient_tolerance_policy: N/A_DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY_IN_P4 unless the row has a same-scalar gradient contract and a later phase freezes a calibrated band before execution.
threshold_policy.reason: Noise scale, horizon, nonlinearity, and particle count alter Monte Carlo error.  P2 therefore freezes diagnostic execution contracts instead of inventing global error thresholds.
threshold_policy.value_tolerance_policy: N/A_DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY_IN_P3 unless a later exact-oracle phase imports a calibrated threshold before execution.
